whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.heading: We Are in Moving Company
whoWeAre.description: We're a Saudi team dedicated to making every move across the Kingdom simpler, faster, and more affordable. ANNGL connects you with a wide range of trusted, certified moving companies so you always get the best service at the best price.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.subheading: Moving made Simple, across Saudi Arabia
whoWeAre.description: We are a Saudi team that aims to make the moving experience easier for all residents of Saudi Arabia by providing fast and convenient moving services. ANNGL is a platform that offers a variety of moving services by presenting a list of the best trusted and certified moving companies, ensuring you receive the highest level of quality at the best prices.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the leading provider of moving services in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, delivering a comprehensive moving experience that combines quality, safety, and ease for ANNGL customers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide a smooth, reliable service with a high level of transparency. ANNGL is always with you during your move and ensures that your belongings are in safe and trustworthy hands.

makeYourMove.title: Ready To Make Your
makeYourMove.buttonText: Reinforce the ease & benefits of using the platform

international.title: International Transportation
international.description: Move your belongings from the Kingdom to Malaysia, the UAE, or any country within the Kingdom, with the most suitable carrier for your needs

local.title: Local Transportation
local.description: Move your belongings within your city or from one city to another within the Kingdom with ease, while choosing the most suitable carrier through Move

car.title: Car Transport
car.description: Move your car between cities within the Kingdom at the best prices with movers specialized in Annql.

device.title: Device Transmission
device.description: Move your electronic and electrical appliances with confidence with competent carriers and technicians through Mov

furniture.title: Moving Furniture
furniture.description: Enjoy a safe and seamless moving experience of moving your furniture to your new location with Move authorized movers

fastSecure.title: Fast, Organized & Secure services
fastSecure.description: ANNGL is committed to providing flexibility and speed through a smart and integrated system that moves your belongings via fast-delivery moving companies

servicesWide.title: Services Wide
servicesWide.description: ANNGL provides comprehensive services in cooperation with reliable moving companies that ensure you an easy, comfortable and safe transportation of your belongings

hero.title: Work With Us

whyChooseUs.title: How do you provide your services with us at ANNGL?
whyChooseUs.feature1: Join us to showcase your services on the kingdom’s largest transportation platforms & reach thousands of customers.
whyChooseUs.feature2: We give you the trust of customers as a certified partner of Transport that supports your reputation in the market.
whyChooseUs.feature3: You can track and manage your orders efficiently and seamlessly through the smart system on the Move platform.

hero.title: How to benefit from our services in
hero.description: At Move, we offer you an innovative platform that makes the transfer process easier and faster than all your previous experiences. modal.aboutCompany: Welcome to Direct Movers! If you are in need of professional moving labor, you have come to the right place. Our team has years of experience in the moving industry and we are dedicated to providing top-notch service to all of our clients. When you hire us, you can expect reliable and efficient service. We take pride in being punctual and getting the job done right the first time. Care for your belongings. We handle all of your items with the utmost care, ensuring that they are safely transported to your new home. Customized solutions. We understand that every move is different and we work with you to create a personalized plan that meets your needs and budget We are confident that you will be satisfied with our services and we look forward to helping you with your next move. Contact us today to get started!
modal.reviewSample: "The platform made finding and booking a mover so easy. The movers were professional and careful with my belongings. Highly recommend!"
